recommendations.title: The Son
recommendations.overview: Painter Lorenzo's life spirals out of control as he fears his wife is trying to isolate him from their infant son.

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: Lover, Stalker, Killer
recommendations.overview: In this twisting documentary, a mechanic tries online dating for the first time and meets a woman who takes romantic obsession to a deadly extreme.

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: Julia X
recommendations.overview: Meeting a man on the Internet, Julia decides to see him in person, only to get abducted and branded with the letter "x" by that guy. A game of cat and mouse follows, but the story has an unexpected twist.

recommendations.title: Restless
recommendations.overview: After going to extremes to cover up an accident, a corrupt cop's life spirals out of control when he starts receiving threats from a mysterious witness.

recommendations.title: Grimcutty
recommendations.overview: A suburban teen girl and her little brother must stop a terrifying internet meme brought to life by the hysteria of their parents.

recommendations.title: The Experiment
recommendations.overview: 20 men are chosen to participate in the roles of guards and prisoners in a psychological study that ultimately spirals out of control.

recommendations.title: Spree
recommendations.overview: Desperate for an online following, a rideshare driver has figured out a deadly plan to go viral and he will stop at nothing to get his five minutes of fame.

recommendations.title: Bringing Down the House
